narrative:
Kettering 2-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,072 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
